qa_pairs.question: Are input files created for ADF compatible with the newer AMS (Amsterdam Modeling Suite) software?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the input for AMS is different from ADF, so previous ADF input files will not run for the new AMS.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find example input files for AMS (Amsterdam Modeling Suite)?
qa_pairs.answer: Some examples for AMS input can be found in `/opt/software/ams/2025.102/examples/`.
